title: Here are Tuesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Apple, Tesla, Microsoft, Oracle, Live Nation, Coinbase & more
sentences: Here are Tuesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Apple, Tesla, Microsoft, Oracle, Live Nation, Coinbase & more This article details significant analyst calls made on Tuesday by various investment firms for major companies like Nvidia, Apple, Tesla, Microsoft, and Oracle.
Analysts reiterated, upgraded, or initiated coverage on several stocks, providing their outlooks and price targets based on company performance, market conditions, and future growth prospects.
Key themes include optimism around AI, recovery in certain sectors, and concerns over declining crypto trading volumes.
